codeReview.summary: Implementation fully satisfies the feature requirements. Extended TestGeneratorConfig with use_proptest, proptest_iterations, and proptest_max_shrink_iters fields. Added TestType::PropertyProptest variant. Implemented generate_proptest_tests() method generating 6 invariant patterns (length bounds, reversibility, determinism, monoid/associativity, idempotence, bounds). Generated tests use proptest! macro with configurable iteration counts. QuickCheck-compatible alternatives included. All 35 tests pass including 10 new proptest tests. Clippy passes with -D warnings.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The documentation example in the doctest at test_generator.rs:19 was missing the 'format: None' field on AcceptanceCriterion. The worker correctly identified and fixed this as part of the implementation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Line 19 doc comment example originally lacked format field; worker added it when fixing the doc test

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker followed the rust-worker skill procedure correctly. skillFeedback.confirmed followedProcedure=true with no deviations.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback shows followedProcedure=true, deviations=[], suggesting skill was appropriate and followed

summary: Feature val-property-based-gen passes scrutiny. The implementation extends test_generator.rs with proptest-based property test generation capability. Config options (use_proptest, proptest_iterations, proptest_max_shrink_iters) are properly wired. Six invariant patterns are generated covering the expected input-space properties. Tests are syntactically valid and compilable. Verification shows all 35 test_generator tests pass and clippy passes cleanly. No blocking issues found.
